content:
MODULE: cosmos.containers.docker_manager
FILE: cosmos/containers/docker_manager.py (717 lines)
CATEGORY: containers

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Docker Manager

"Containers within containers! It's like Russian nesting dolls, but for code!"

Comprehensive Docker container and image management.

CLASSES:
- ContainerStatus(Enum): Container status.
- Container: Container information.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- DockerImage: Docker image information.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- ContainerStats: Container resource statistics.
- DockerManager: Comprehensive Docker management for cosmos.

Features:
- Container lifecycle man
  Methods: def list_containers(self, all_containers: bool=True, filters: Dict[str, Any]=None) -> List[Container
  Methods: def get_container(self, container_id: str) -> Optional[Container]
  Methods: def run_container(self, image: str, name: str=None, command: str=None, environment: Dict[str, str]=N
  Methods: def start_container(self, container_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def stop_container(self, container_id: str, timeout: int=10) -> bool
  Methods: def restart_container(self, container_id: str, timeout: int=10) -> bool
  Methods: def remove_container(self, container_id: str, force: bool=False, volumes: bool=False) -> bool
  Methods: def get_container_logs(self, container_id: str, tail: int=100, since: datetime=None, until: datetime
